business.headline: Sensex, Nifty opening: Will stock markets rise or fall today?GIFT Nifty futures were trading at 24,469.50 at 7:57 am, indicating that the Nifty 50 may open above Friday's close of 24,353.55.

Why your car insurance may not pay when you need it mostAn accident, a flooded road, a damaged engine, and a car insurance claim is filed with the expectation that the insurer will step in. But for many, that moment turns into something else entirely: confusion, partial payouts, or in some cases, outright rejection.

India's digital payments boom has a growing fraud problemIndia's digital boom has made payments effortless, but also easier to exploit. From fake identities to instant scams, fraudsters are moving faster than the systems meant to stop them, and users are paying the price.

Govt approves 2% dearness allowance hike for central govt employees, pensionersThe Union Cabinet approved a 2% hike in Dearness Allowance for government employees and pensioners, along with key decisions including a Rs 13,000 crore Sovereign Maritime Fund and extension of PMGSY till 2028.

On paper, compliant: How labour laws are quietly underminedIn the third episode in this series on labour laws and Inspector Raj, this article examines how employers maintain compliance on paper while systematically evading legal obligations in practice.

Netflix shares slide over 9% as co-founder Reed Hastings steps downHastings has been a key figure in shaping Netflix into what it is today. He co-founded the company and played a major role in transforming it from a DVD-by-mail service into a global streaming giant.

Forced to mis-sell: IIIT graduate quits Rs 17 LPA bank job, cites sales pressureChirag Madaan's resignation from his Rs 17 lakh per annum banking job has reignited focus on mis-selling at financial institutions, an issue IndiaToday.in had earlier highlighted through its investigation into how sales targets and incentives shape what customers are sold.

Gautam Adani overtakes Mukesh Ambani to become Asia's richestThe latest ranking places Gautam Adani at the top spot in Asia, with Mukesh Ambani now in second place. Both remain among the top 25 richest people globally, even as their wealth levels have seen changes this year.

2% to 4% DA hike likely: Here's how much your monthly pay may riseA fresh DA revision is around the corner, and early estimates suggest a 2% to 4% hike, but how much extra could this actually add to your monthly salary? Let's have a look.

India slips to 6th-largest economy: What IMF's latest data showsIndia has slipped out of the world's top five economies in nominal GDP terms, going by the IMF's latest World Economic Outlook estimates. The change says more about currency than growth, with projections suggesting the loss in ranking may not last long.

Markets open flat as geopolitical tensions ease, but caution remainsThe BSE Sensex was trading at 78,030.99, up 42.31 points or 0.05% at around 9:43 am. The Nifty 50, however, slipped marginally by 6.85 points or 0.03% to 24,189.90.

Gurugram circle rates increase by up to 75%: How much will home prices rise?The revision in Gurugram circle rates comes at a time when the city continues to see strong demand due to its proximity to the airport and the presence of major offices and industries.

entertainment.headline: Daredevil, Punisher, Jessica Jones: MCU street vigilantes deserve film franchises As Marvel navigates post-Phase 4 fatigue and leans heavily on nostalgia with Spider-Man: Brand New Day and Avengers crossovers, is it time to bring the raw, grounded vigilantes like Daredevil, Punisher and Jessica Jones in standalone theatrical releases? Can street heroes outshine MCU's cosmic warriors on the big-screen?

Ramayana's 20-minute clip stuns viewers at CinemaCon, creator says Oscar hopes rise Nitesh Tiwari's Ramayana is creating waves internationally with exclusive footage receiving rave reviews at CinemaCon. According to a creator, the film is poised for a global release and potential Oscar nominations.

She also said the South offers more meaningful roles for women.

Kara trailer: Dhanush returns as reformed robber in Vignesh Raja's crime drama The trailer of Kara, starring Dhanush, offers a gripping glimpse into a story set against the 1991 Gulf War backdrop. Directed by Vignesh Raja, the film releases in theatres on April 30.

French actor Nathalie Baye, known for Catch Me If You Can, dies at 77 French actor Nathalie Baye, known for playing Leonardo DiCaprio's mother in Catch Me If You Can, died at 77 after battling Lewy body dementia.

Shruti Haasan loses her cool at paps for calling her mumma: What are you saying? Shruti Haasan reacted sharply after a paparazzo called her "mumma" during a public outing, in a moment that quickly went viral. The incident has sparked debate around personal boundaries, with many backing her stance.
Darshan Kumar, T-Series veteran and Gulshan Kumar's brother, dies at 70 Darshan Kumar, younger brother of Gulshan Kumar and a key figure behind T-Series, died in Delhi. He was 70 years old.

Samantha, Katrina to Priyanka: Bollywood showers Deepika-Ranveer with love B-town's favourite couple is expanding their family and the stars are thrilled! Deepika Padukone and Ranveer Singh announced second pregnancy with an adorable post on April 19.

Mahavatar Parshuram first look poster out, set for 2027 release The Mahavatar Cinematic Universe expands with Mahavatar Parshuram, the second film based on Lord Vishnu's avatars. The upcoming instalment aims to present a story of justice and valour, blending mythology with a contemporary narrative.

Pawan Kalyan undergoes surgery: Ram Charan, Allu Arjun, celebs wish speedy recovery Pawan Kalyan underwent surgery after a sudden health issue and has been advised about 10 days of rest. His wife Anna Lezhneva confirmed he is recovering well, while several actors wished him a speedy recovery.

Salman Khan roasts Varun Dhawan in fun BTS video from Hai Jawani song. Watch A fun BTS video from Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai, featuring Varun Dhawan and Salman Khan, has gone viral for their easy camaraderie. The track Vyah Karwado Ji, sung by Mika Singh and Asees Kaur, is set to be a lively addition to the film, which releases on May 22.

Akshay Kumar on Wamiqa being compared to Aishwarya, Katrina: She has her identity Akshay Kumar reacted to social media users comparing his Bhooth Bangla co-star Wamiqa Gavbi with Aishwarya Rai and Katrina Kaif.

Actor Shivaleeka Oberoi, filmmaker Abhishek Pathak welcome baby girl: Our precious Actor Shivaleeka Oberoi and filmmaker Abhishek Pathak have become parents to a baby girl. The couple shared the news with a heartfelt social media post.

Zanai remembers grandmother Asha Bhosle with rare pics: You are missed every second Zanai Bhosle shared an emotional post remembering her grandmother Asha Bhosle, who died on April 12 due to multiple organ failure.

Deepika Padukone, Ranveer Singh confirm second pregnancy with a cute pic Deepika Padukone and Ranveer Singh have announced that they are expecting their second child with a heartfelt Instagram post featuring their daughter Dua.

general news.headline: Iran says it hit US ships after American forces targeted vessel near HormuzIran reportedly launched drone strikes targeting US military vessels in the Sea of Oman after American forces seized an Iranian cargo ship accused of breaching a naval blockade near the Strait of Hormuz. The escalation raises concerns over the fragile ceasefire and renewed tensions in the key global shipping corridor.

Iran to skip talks 2.0 in Pak, blames excessive US demands, Hormuz blockadeHopes of a breakthrough faded after Iran confirmed its absence from the second round of talks in Islamabad, which it said stemmed from Washington's "excessive demands, unrealistic expectations, constant shifts in stance, repeated contradictions", and the naval blockade of its ports.

How Gulf countries paid $142 billion to US for a leaky THAAD umbrellaGulf countries poured billions into American missile defences designed to stop Iran's arsenal. Yet when retaliation came, sheer volume and cost asymmetry turned the equation. The Middle East countries were left with charred THAAD systems and a costly lesson.

Siddharth effectively came to haunt them the match against PBKS. Pant also had a howler with DRS, which gave Cooper Connolly a second life.

Israeli soldier vandalises Jesus Christ statue in Lebanon, military vows actionAn Israeli soldier was seen vandalising a statue of Jesus Christ in southern Lebanon, with the IDF later confirming the image's authenticity and launching an investigation. The military said the act violates its values, promised action against those involved.

Astronaut does Bihu in space. Assam CM credits PM Modi, gets fact-checkedA Nasa astronaut wore the traditional Assamese gamusa and performed a Bihu dance aboard the International Space Station, in a quiet and beautiful tribute to his wife, who hails from Assam.

Live: More than 20 vessels passed Hormuz over the weekend, tracking data showsUS-Iran-Israel War Live Updates: Iran refused to hold the second round of the ceasefire talks with the United States, citing Washington's "excessive demands, unrealistic expectations, constant shifts in stance, repeated contradictions, and the naval blockade of the maritime chokepoint, Strait of Hormuz. Meanwhile, Donald Trump said that the US delegation team, led by Vice President JD Vance, will arrive in Islamabad today. However, after Iran's refusal, further ceasefire talks regarding the prevailing West Asia conflict look bleak. Amid the developments, Pakistan's Prime Minister, Shehbaz Sharif, held a phone call with Iran's President, Masoud Pezeshkian, and discussed the regional situation. He also briefed Pezeshkian on the conversation the South Asian country had with Saudi Arabia, Qatar, and Turkey. Catch all the live updates at Indiatoday.in.

Man shows up at station at 1 am for daughter's arrival. Video will make you smileA woman's father came to receive her at 1am from a railway station, with the heartfelt video capturing unconditional love, warmth, and a bond that resonated deeply online.

Green card-holding Iranian woman arrested in US for selling arms for TehranProsecutors also accused Shamim Mafi of facilitating deals involving Iranian-made weapons, including drones, bomb fuses and millions of rounds of ammunition destined for Sudan.

Louisiana shooting: Suspect identified as children's father, was mentally unstableA Louisiana father, Shamar Elkins, shot and killed eight children, seven of his own, in a domestic violence attack across two homes in Shreveport following an argument with his wife.

Gun in hand, reel rolling: 3 killed after speeding bike hits truck on highwayThe video shows the three riders trying to overtake a truck when a brick-laden trolley comes into view ahead. Moving at high speed, they are unable to control the bike and crash into the rear of the stationary trolley.

If you have physical needs...: Woman details months of harassment at TCS NashikIn her police complaint accessed by India Today TV, a woman employee has alleged months of harassment, stalking and religious slurs by five colleagues at Tata Consultancy Services' (TCS) Nashik BPO unit.

Scorching heat, heavy rain: What's in store for India on MondayThe IMD has issued heatwave warnings for Jharkhand, West Uttar Pradesh, West Rajasthan, Vidarbha, and several other states for Monday, April 20, with temperatures expected to touch 45 degrees Celsius in isolated pockets.

On Sunday, Punjab Kings beat the Lucknow Super Giants by 54 runs.

Hit most sixes, win my bat: Shreyas Iyer on PBKS challenge after LSG smash show Shreyas Iyer revealed Punjab Kings have an in-house six-hitting contest, with his bat as the prize, after PBKS smashed 21 sixes against LSG in IPL 2026. PBKS have 63 sixes in six matches so far in the IPL.

Unbeaten, unbroken, unbowed: Priyansh, Connolly power Punjab to epic thrashing of LSG IPL 2026, PBKS vs LSG: Priyansh Arya and Cooper Connolly powered Punjab Kings to a massive 54-run win over Lucknow Super Giants. As Punjab continued their unbeaten run, Lucknow Super Giants sank further in the Indian Premier League table.

Advantage Manchester City in title race as Haaland's winner downs Arsenal Manchester City defeated Arsenal at the Etihad as goals from Erling Haaland and Rayan Cherki sealed a huge win in the Premier League title race despite Kai Havertz's equaliser.

Babar Azam upskilling in T20s? Pakistan batter plays only 1 dot ball in PSL century PSL 2026: Babar Azam smashed a 52-ball century against Quetta Gladiators, playing just one dot ball in the entire innings. He brought up his hundred with six fours and four sixes, powering Peshawar Zalmi to a commanding 255 for three.

Rohit Sharma returns to MI nets, but will he play against GT in Ahmedabad? Rohit Sharma returned to the nets ahead of the Mumbai Indians' clash against the Gujarat Titans after missing the PBKS game with a hamstring injury. A final decision on his availability is pending.

Priyansh Arya, Connolly headline Mullanpur rout of Lucknow with 182-run stand The Punjab Kings turned Mullanpur into a batting amphitheater on Sunday, as Priyansh Arya (93) and Cooper Connolly (87) stitched together a breathtaking 182-run stand to dismantle Lucknow Super Giants in their IPL 2026 clash.

Relieved Ajinkya Rahane jokes of getting 5 extra minutes after KKR's win over RR A relieved Ajinkya Rahane joked that he was happy to get the five extra minutes to conduct the post-match interview after KKR secured their first win of the season against RR.

India Women's familiar frailties exposed again as South Africa go 2-0 up in Durban SAW vs INDW, 2nd T20I: India Women lost the second T20I by eight wickets on Sunday at the Kingsmead in Durban to go 0-2 down in the five-match series. Chasing 148, South Africa romped home with 17 balls to spare.

Rashid Khan turned down citizenship offer from India: I will play for AfghanistanAfghanistan talisman Rashid Khan has revealed that he turned down offers of citizenship from India and Australia, choosing instead to remain committed to representing his country.

How Rinku Singh overcame early brainfade moment to power KKR to first winRinku Singh revealed he had a brief mental lapse during his match-winning knock of 53 against Rajasthan Royals as KKR secured their first IPL 2026 win at Eden Gardens. Rinku finally came into form with his knock of 53.

Rinku the difference as KKR squeeze through for first win in Eden tug-of-warIPL 2026, KKR vs RR: Rinku Singh held his nerve in a tense finish to guide Kolkata Knight Riders to a much-needed first win of IPL 2026, edging past Rajasthan Royals in a low-scoring thriller at Eden Gardens.

Best stumping of IPL 2026? Dhruv Jurel's electric reaction stuns Cameron GreenIPL 2026, KKR vs RR: Dhruv Jurel pulled off a stupendous stumping to dismiss Cameron Green, who made 27 off 13 in the match on Sunday at the Eden Gardens in Kolkata.

Varun Chakravarthy back in form, becomes fastest Indian spinner to 200 T20 wicketsVarun Chakravarthy returned to form with a decisive spell as Kolkata Knight Riders' spin attack restricted Rajasthan Royals to 155/9 in Match 28 of the Indian Premier League at Eden Gardens on Sunday, becoming the fastest Indian spinner to reach 200 T20 wickets in the process.

Shafali Verma, once 15-year-old debutant, now India's youngest to 100 T20IsSAW vs INDW, 2nd T20I: At 22 years and 81 days, Shafali Verma became the youngest Indian to play 100 T20Is, breaking the record of Jemimah Rodrigues.

Tottenham Hotspur call for police action over racism against DansoTottenham Hotspur slammed the racist abuse aimed at Kevin Danso after their 2-2 draw against Brighton. Spurs called the messages vile and dehumanising as Danso responded strongly.
South Africa Women vs India Women, 2nd T20I: Highlights from DurbanSAW vs INDW, 2nd T20I Highlights: India slumped to an eight-wicket defeat in Durban and went 0-2 down in the five-match series.

After PSL slump, Mohammad Rizwan admits he doesn't deserve Pakistan selectionAfter a poor run in the Pakistan Super League, Mohammad Rizwan offered a frank assessment of his form, admitting that he does not currently deserve a place in Pakistan's T20I side.

Samson to replace Ruturaj as CSK's captain? R Ashwin makes bold predictionIPL 2026: Chennai Super Kings' poor run under Ruturaj Gaikwad has reignited leadership debates, with Ravichandran Ashwin suggesting Sanju Samson could take over captaincy in the near future. With ongoing struggles in big chases and injuries in the squad, CSK will rely on Samson's form and leadership potential moving forward.

KKR vs RR Highlights: Rinku Singh magic hands KKR first win of seasonKolkata (KKR) vs Rajasthan (RR) Highlights, IPL 2026 today match: Rinku Singh magic at the Eden as Kolkata Knight Riders secure their first win of the season by four wickets. The hosts had their backs to the wall but Rinku and Anukul's partnership gets them over the line for the first two points of the season.

PSL never offered contract: Blessing Muzarabani's agent hits out at 2-year banBlessing Muzarabani's agency has hit out at PSL's two-year ban, claiming no contract was ever signed before his move to KKR, and urging the league to withdraw the decision.

IPL: KKR receive big boost as Matheesha Pathirana joins camp after injury layoffSri Lankan pacer Matheesha Pathirana has finally arrived in the city to join Kolkata Knight Riders, giving a much-needed boost to the side that is currently languishing at the bottom of the IPL table.

IPL 2026: CSK coach confirms Ayush Mhatre's injury, talks about MS Dhoni's returnIPL 2026: Chennai Super Kings batting coach Michael Hussey confirmed that young batter Ayush Mhatre suffered a hamstring tear during the match against Sunrisers Hyderabad, with scans pending to determine the severity of the injury.

Lalit Modi shuts down Pietersen's 'UK IPL' claim on Hundred: Not in this lifetimeIPL founder Lalit Modi has firmly rejected comparisons between the Indian Premier League and The Hundred, issuing a sharp rebuttal to Kevin Pietersen's claim that England's franchise tournament could eventually mirror the IPL.

Unbeaten Punjab Kings aim to continue run against struggling LucknowPBKS vs LSG Preview: Punjab Kings' resurgence under Ricky Ponting faces a stern test against an inconsistent Lucknow Super Giants, with Rishabh Pant under pressure to deliver.

Sangakkara urges Suryavanshi to keep being fearless, bat with sense of wonderIPL 2026: Kumar Sangakkara has urged Vaibhav Sooryavanshi to commit to his batting style, while staying grounde. He wants the teenage batter to continue enjoying his cricket despite his explosive IPL start.

Doctor by day, marathoner by dawn: Kartik Karkera chases Asian Games goldKartik Karkera has emerged as a wildcard in the Indian marathon scene. The Orthopedic doctor has won the Mumbai and Delhi marathons, at a pace that makes him one of India's fastest marathoners of all time. Currently in Nashik, Kartik speaks to India Today about his dream of winning Asian Games gold and representing India at the Olympics.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
